nasb.text: Then it happened as often as the king entered the house of the Lord, that the guards would carry them and would bring them back into the guards’ room.

esv.text: And as often as the king went into the house of the Lord, the guard carried them and brought them back to the guardroom.

cnv.text: 王每次進耶和華殿的時候，衛兵就拿著這些盾牌，隨後又把盾牌送回護衛室裡。

ccb.text: 每次王进耶和华的殿，护卫军就带上盾牌，用完后放回护卫房。
